QF.id: III-C Prevention of Money Laundering Act_17

question.text: Are intermediaries required to make nil reporting to FIU-IND if there are no suspicious transactions to report?

answer.text: Yes, nil reporting is required annually
No, no nil reporting needs to be made
Yes, nil reporting is mandatory every month
Yes, nil reporting is required quarterly

explanation.text: **The Logic:** As per Section 9.3.10(f), no nil reporting needs to be made to FIU-IND in case there are no cash/suspicious/non-profit organization transactions to report. **The Trap:** Many regulatory systems require nil returns but PMLA reporting to FIU-IND does not. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** This reduces unnecessary administrative burden while ensuring meaningful reporting.
